items.question: When is the RSVP deadline?
items.answer: Please RSVP by 15 April so we can get an accurate idea of numbers. 🙂

items.question: Can I bring a date?
items.answer: Please check your invitation to see if you have a plus one.

items.question: Are children invited?
items.answer: As much as we adore your little ones, we won’t be including them in the ceremony or reception. However, we know some of you will be travelling with your children, so they’re more than welcome at the Friday cocktail reception and Sunday brunch! We’ll also be offering a babysitting service at the venue during the ceremony if you’re unable to arrange other care. If you have any questions, just let us know!

items.question: What’s the weather going to be like?
items.answer: Welcome to Rome! You can expect warm, sunny weather—usually around 28–34°C in the day—with lovely evenings. Light clothes and plenty of water are definitely recommended.

items.question: Where can I park?
items.answer: There’s plenty of free parking close to the entrance of the venue.

items.question: Are the ceremony and reception spaces accessible for wheelchairs?
items.answer: Yes! We’ll have a buggy available for anyone who needs a hand getting around the grounds.

items.question: What’s the dress code?
items.answer: Have a look at our Schedule for dress code details.

items.question: Is the wedding inside or outside?
items.answer: Our ceremony will be outdoors, but the reception’s in a marquee :)

items.question: Which shoes should I wear (or steer clear of)?
items.answer: Ladies, give the stilettos a miss—honestly! There are plenty of grassy and uneven spots, so block heels or sandals are a much safer bet. We’d hate for anyone to ruin their shoes or twist an ankle.

items.question: Can we take photos on our phones or cameras during the wedding?
items.answer: Absolutely! We’d love you to snap some photos and share them on our Joy app. Just a quick note—please don’t take photos during the ceremony itself.

items.question: Who should I contact if I’ve got questions?
items.answer: If you’ve got any questions, just get in touch with our brilliant Maid of Honour, Chiara, on +39 347 123 4567.
